arts.ttl: Strasbourg predicted XI v Angers: Caleb Wiley out, Djordje Petrovic to start
arts.sum: Looking to bounce back after their second-half collapse against Olympique Lyonnais, RC Strasbourg Alsace face SCO Angers at the Meinau on Sunday afternoon. For the fixture, Liam Rosenior has almost…

arts.ttl: Alexandre Dujeux wants Angers to ‘prove that it deserves better’ after difficult start
arts.sum: After three games, Angers SCO sit in the relegation zone. The newly promoted side have yet to register a point and are above only AS Saint-Étienne on goal difference, helped…
